# REAL OpenFOAM-coupled FSI test: pimpleFoam (cfsdeps OpenFOAM + openfoam-adapter)
# couples against the cfs mechanic "Solid" flap - parallel-implicit + IQN-ILS on the
# three flap interfaces (Stress -> forceDensity, Displacement -> mesh motion). The
# fluid mesh is generated by blockMesh at test time; the cfs flap mesh and the
# blockMeshDict come from one block spec (make_meshes.py). Only registered in
# USE_OPENFOAM builds (see ../CMakeLists.txt).
#
# Deliberately NO passive one-way data (DisplacementVolume/SmoothPDE): preCICE 3.4.1
# serves passive exchanged data nondeterministically, which makes reference
# comparison impossible (see 'precice-passive-data-read-nondeterminism.md'). All
# compared results here flow through the scheme-synchronized channels, which are
# reproducible (verified bit-identical across runs and thread counts).
#
# EPSILON is 1e-3 (not the usual 1e-5): the reference comes from a real CFD solve;
# cross-platform floating-point differences make results reproducible to ~1e-4
# relative, not to machine precision.
GENERATE_TEST_NAME_AND_FILE("${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}")

ADD_TEST(${TEST_NAME}
  ${CMAKE_COMMAND}
  -DEPSILON:STRING=1e-3
  -DCURRENT_TEST_DIR=${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
  -DFOAM_SOLVER:STRING=pimpleFoam
  -DFOAM_CASE_DIR:STRING=fluid-openfoam
  -P ${CFS_COUPLED_FOAM_TEST}
)

# Two participants (pimpleFoam + cfs). Serialise preCICE tests (m2n socket clash
# under `ctest -j`) and label them for selection/exclusion.
set_tests_properties(${TEST_NAME} PROPERTIES
  PROCESSORS 2
  RESOURCE_LOCK precice_socket
  LABELS "preCICE")
